chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P No. D – 355 of 2021 Date Order with Signature of Hon’ble Judge Hearing of cases 1. For orders on Office objection at Flag ‘A’ 2. For hearing of main case 29.11.2022 Ms. Iqbal Hussain Joyo, Advocate for the petitioner Mr. Shahryar Awan, Assistant Advocate General Respondent No.8 / Abdul Raqeeb present in person <><><><>..<><><><> Learned counsel for the petitioner under instructions does not press instant petition and states that the petitioner for redressal of his grievances shall approach to Anti-Encroachment Tribunal. Accordingly, this petition stands dismissed as not pressed, leaving the petitioner at liberty to approach the concerned forum in accordance with the law, if so advised. Judge Judge ARBROHI
